title: Grill'd Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: The ACCC commenced Federal Court proceedings on 16 June 2026 alleging that Grill'd's 'Tree Day Tuesday' campaign (January 2021-April 2024) represented that $1 from every Tuesday burger purchase would go to tree-planting through its partner Greenfleet Trust, when undisclosed conditions - requiring Relish loyalty membership, dine-in purchase, a qualifying main item bought at the front counter, a barcode scan, and no other offer combined - meant only a small share of purchases actually qualified (reported as roughly 4% of over 5 million Tuesday burgers sold). The ACCC has characterised the conduct as a form of greenwashing.
scope: Subject of Federal Court proceedings brought by the ACCC alleging misleading environmental/charitable representations, ongoing; Alleged that only a small share of purchases actually qualified for the advertised tree-planting donation due to undisclosed conditions
